description: Define your brand's visual DNA. VIS uses this to enforce consistency across all visual assets.

heroImages.notes: Must work with gradient overlay on bottom 40%

ogImages.notes: Must be readable at 300px thumbnail size

perspectives.question: Does this match our visual DNA?
perspectives.rejectIf: Off-brand colors, wrong theme, generic stock feel

perspectives.question: Does this drive the user toward action?
perspectives.rejectIf: Distracting, information-dense at small sizes, competing hierarchy

perspectives.question: Is this accessible to all users?
perspectives.rejectIf: Low contrast, empty alt text, color-only information
